values: Phase-level plan from Foundation to MVP reporting. Portfolio remains Post-MVP.
Foundation scope is accepted as baseline for the Mini Rally BA pack.
Testing document exists and Phase 0 is not in the current change scope.
Projects, Teams, Users, Backlog, Work Item detail, Task, Time, Content and Activity are covered as the core work-management baseline.
Testing document exists; keep remaining implementation defects as prod follow-up rather than BA scope change.
Backlog filters, sorting, rank/order behavior, bulk assignment and Iteration/Release assignment are confirmed.
No schema/infra changes in this BA pass.
Iterations default to Planning; assigning backlog into an Iteration means the team has committed scope.
Status remains manual-first; system auto-status is convenience only.
Iteration Status supports manual team execution; when all US/DE are Accepted the system may auto-mark Iteration Accepted, but user can override manually.
No lock: teams can still add US/DE while sprint is running.
Team Status, Release Management, Milestones and Quality > Defect are confirmed for dev execution. Team Board is out of current Agile MVP.
Task roll-up, manual status override, release/milestone assignment and quality dashboard rules are confirmed.
Notifications, RBAC/permissions, settings, audit and workflow governance after the execution flow is stable.
Team Board is placed in Backlog for the future, not in the current Agile flow.
Dashboard, Burndown, Velocity, Workload, Release Progress and Exports.
Define once operational data and Phase 3 flow are stable.
Optional; not included in MVP release forecast.
Detailed build checklist: what each phase needs to build, who owns it, estimate and release target.
Verify migrations, fixed company, admin seed, auth/session and project/team context API are production-ready.
Wire protected routes, navigation, breadcrumb, context selector and access/error states.
Verify create/edit/archive/restore project, fixed workspace, permission enforcement and smoke tests.
Build Manage > Projects create/edit/deactive flow and project selector compatibility.
Build Teams list and Team Info/Members modal; status Active/Deactive; members selectable with search.
Build Users list and Invite/Edit User modal; assign user to teams only; user project access derives from Team -> Project.
Build Story/Defect backlog list with selected Project/Team context, server search/filter/sort/pagination.
Build Story/Defect quick create and create-with-details; Project/Team required and validated.
Build full detail page with Details, Tasks, Revision History and right-panel fields.
Build task list, add task modal, task detail, task estimates and parent validation.
Persist Plan Estimate, To Do, Actual, Description, Notes, Attachments and Revision History.
Add Manage Filters, column sorting, resizable columns, inline edit, rank reorder and bulk release/iteration assignment.
Build Plan > Timeboxes Iterations list, quick create, create-with-details and full Iteration detail.
Expose Work Item Iteration field in Backlog list/detail and validate Project/Team match.
Build Track > Iteration Status selector, metrics strip, list, filters, inline edit and detail integration.
Create Story/Defect directly into selected Iteration and also show it in Backlog; reuse Backlog create-with-details flow.
Build Team Status from Iteration Status template. Tasks are optional child records; when all child Tasks are Completed, parent US/DE can auto-complete, while user can still change status manually.
Build Release list/create/detail with Planning/Active/Accepted status. A Story/Defect has one active Release assignment; readiness is interpreted by users from US/DE notes, not a locked checklist.
Build project-level Milestone list/create/detail: multi project/team/release selection, target dates, owner/status and direct assignment of US/DE artifacts to the milestone.
Build dedicated Quality > Defect dashboard using Backlog Defect data and columns: Rank, ID, Name, User Story, Severity, Priority, State, Flow State, Fixed In Build, Iteration, Submitted By, Owner.
Task Dashboard supports inline edit for Task status and key fields. The auto-complete behavior is convenience only and does not lock manual US/DE status changes.
No readiness checklist in app; users gather readiness from US/DE release notes. Keep release summary and notes editable.
Keep Team Board in Backlog for the future. Current Agile flow continues with Backlog, Iteration Status, Team Status, Release, Milestone and Quality views.
Build in-app notifications for assigned, mentioned, comments, status, iteration/release dates and read/unread.
Define and enforce workspace/project roles, action-level gating, backend permission codes and access denied states.
Project/workflow settings, labels, user admin rules, audit log and destructive confirmation patterns.
Build project/iteration dashboard, burndown, velocity, planned vs completed and blocked item rollups.
Build workload, defect summary, release progress, filters and export report capability.
Verify report numbers against source records, permissions and export output.

values: Confirmed BA rules for Phase 3 development after Part 1-5 confirmation and final audit.
Child Tasks are optional. When all Tasks under a US/DE are Completed, that US/DE can auto-complete; user may still manually change status.
Iteration starts Planning; assigning backlog commits sprint scope; all US/DE Accepted can auto-mark Iteration Accepted, but manual status override remains allowed.
Team Status remains a tracking view; no board lock and no restriction on adding US/DE while sprint is running.
One active Release assignment per Story/Defect. Release status is user-managed; no readiness checklist lock.
Milestones can link multiple projects/teams/releases and assign US/DE artifacts directly.
Dedicated Quality > Defect dashboard uses Defect work items and keeps advanced actions such as delete/reopen/bulk for later.
Team Board is not part of the current Agile MVP flow and is moved to Future Backlog.

values: Scenario plan for evening delivery capacity. Change assumptions to refresh planning logic.
Open risks and decisions that can change timeline, priority or scope.
Auto-status must not remove user control.
Treat auto-complete as convenience only. Users can manually change Task, US/DE, Release, Milestone and Iteration status.
Phase 3 development can drift if docs and mockups are not frozen.
Use the confirmed Part 1-5 rules as the dev handoff baseline; schema/DB/infra remain out of scope for this BA pass.
Phase estimates are planning estimates, not implementation commitments.
Keep estimate/remaining columns visible and update with dev evidence during execution.
Team Board must not be included in the current Agile MVP flow.
Workbook places Team Board in Future Backlog and keeps Team Status as the Phase 3 tracking view.
Milestone artifact behavior is confirmed at BA level.
Milestones may assign US/DE artifacts directly; no readiness checklist is required.
Harden RBAC, settings and audit in Phase 4 after core Agile flow stabilizes.
Phase 0-3 testing and traceability need to stay synchronized as dev continues.
Testing documents exist and should be updated when production behavior changes.
